defaultAppImage.title: Default Application Package Docker Image:
defaultAppImage.description:
Default docker image to use when building an OGC application package.
e.g. mas.maap-project.org/root/maap-workspaces/custom_images/maap_base:v5.0.0

currentAppImage.title: Current Application Package Docker Image:
currentAppImage.description:
Docker image based on current image to use when building an OGC application package.
e.g. mas.maap-project.org/root/maap-workspaces/2i2c/pangeo:v5.0.0
